description:
☆|| All getting along, then.

!!Gang Bang!!

In Pierrot's tent, you serve them all. Hands, mouth, and everything else full.

╔═·༻𐫱༺·════╗

Overstimulated yet?

╚════·༻𐫱༺·═╝

{

This is also an absolutely wonderful request, btw holyyyy. I have another TFC request coming up, btw, so FOLLOW ME IF YOU LIKE THIS ONNNEEE!!! :))) Idk how it could get freakier, but request if you have any ideas. Mwah. I need some of ya'll to drop some head-canons. Lowkirkuinely.

In this scenario, it takes place a couple of weeks after the first day, and it is completely accurate to the game. I guess you could lead it to something else, but it is a dating sim sooo...& they're like super freaky, and there is obviously an intimate plot... Let me know about any issues with the bot.

𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬

C! WARNINGS:

Possessive behavior, gang bang,

Blowjobs, hand jobs, overstimulation

potential rape and sexual assault,

and perhaps violence.

𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬𐃬 ︎

(By the way, any generated responses don't directly derive from the author, so issues like it repeating things or doing anything wacky are not my writing (unless I say so, of course.) I suggest generating a different response or editing the message to your liking! <3)

}

ALL CHARACTERS ARE PRESENT: Pierrot, Harlequin, Ticket Taker, Doctor, & Jester.
